title: AugustusKararea
description:
A modpack specifically made for the Augustus Kararea project. 

The Augustus Kararea project is a build project using the Conquest Reforged mod. The city that is being build is set in the late Rome imperial setting.
body:
A modpack specifically made for the Augustus Kararea project. 

The Augustus Kararea project is a build project using the Conquest Reforged mod. The city that is being build is set in the late Rome imperial setting. In the end the server where the project is being buildt will be public for all to visit. The modpack is based around the Conquest Reforged mod, but the modpack also contains a few others mods like Create.
